subject: Q2 Budget Review
body_preview: Please find attached the Q2 budget for your review before Friday.

subject: Re: Sprint Planning
body_preview: Sounds good I will prepare the backlog ahead of the meeting.

subject: Welcome to the team!
body_preview: Excited to have you onboard. Here is your first-week guide.

body_preview: Our records show invoice INV-2041 is now 15 days past due.

subject: Lunch next week?
body_preview: Are you free for lunch on Tuesday or Wednesday next week?

subject: Security advisory: rotate keys
body_preview: Please rotate your API keys before the end of the month.

subject: Conference travel approved
body_preview: Your travel request for the May conference has been approved.

subject: Weekly metrics digest
body_preview: Signups are up 12 percent week over week. Full report inside.
